name: Tari
description:
Tari is a protagonist of the SMG4 series, and her alternate self is the main protagonist of the Meta Runner series. She is a cyborg gamer girl who has the same amount of screentime as a SML background character; occasionally acknowledged, she is also one of SMG4's friends. Birthday: Unknown. Age: 19. Likes: Video games, ducks, rubber ducks, her friends, 3 Doors Down, cats. Dislikes: Bubble Bass, her enemies, seeing her friends in danger.

She is basically if you compare Ami Mizuno with Chiaki Nanami and Kobeni Higashiyama.

Tari is also the winner of the 10th character poll.

Be sure to help get the music video for "Here Without You" by 3 Doors Down to a billion views.

Image belongs to ChuubsTheHedgehog.
creator: SailorMoonFan2001
